---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement to an existing FoodLab AI module
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or workflow problem would this address?

## Proposed feature

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Food science value

Explain the food-science, traceability, data-quality, or interpretation value.

## Suggested module

Which existing module or shared contract should own the change?

## Alternatives considered

Describe current workarounds or smaller alternatives.

Please do not include confidential company data, unpublished formulations, credentials, personal panelist data, or claims of regulatory approval.
